name: Corn Dog
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cornmeal, flour, sugar, mustard, baking powder and salt in a large bowl, mixing well.
2. Add the milk, egg and melted shortening to the dry ingredients. Mix until very smooth.
3. Place the frankfurters on the skewers/sticks.
4. Dip each frankfurter into the cornmeal batter to coat evenly.
5. Heat oil for deep frying in a deep fryer or heavy-based saucepan to 375°F (190°C).
6. Carefully lower the coated frankfurters into the hot oil using tongs or a spider skillet.
7. Fry until golden brown, about two minutes.
8. Remove the corn dogs from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
